entities.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark shorts, rain boots, carrying a school bag, cautious expression
small gray cat, lean body, bright eyes, wet fur, expressive face, able to speak
rainy night city backstreet, wet pavement, puddles, dim streetlamp, narrow walls and drainpipes

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a rainy night backstreet, wet pavement reflecting a dim streetlamp, heavy rain falling in dramatic manga lines.
The boy in a blue hooded raincoat walks alone through the backstreet, shoulders hunched against the rain, school bag clutched close.
Close shot of the boy stopping beside a large puddle as a small shadow moves near a stack of crates under the streetlamp.
A wet gray cat steps out from behind the crates, sitting calmly in the rain and staring directly at the boy.
Dramatic close-up of the gray cat lifting its head, rain dripping from its whiskers, eyes sharp and intelligent.
The boy recoils in shock, hood slipping back slightly, one boot splashing in a puddle while the cat remains composed.
The cat walks ahead through the narrow alley, tail raised, while the boy hesitantly follows under the rain.
They reach a hidden dry doorway under an old awning; the boy crouches beside the cat as rain crashes beyond the shelter.

text.content: 巷尾藏着一处避雨角落。

panels.summary: Warm final composition despite black-and-white tones: the boy smiles softly at the gray cat under the awning, rain curtain behind them and streetlamp glow reflected in puddles.
